languages.text: {n}Молитва по умирающим машинным духам вселяет в них решимость для одного последнего деяния, и голос становится четче.{/n} "Меровско.... штрафного легиона. Реквизировавший нас.... Себериан фон Валанциус погиб. У нас нет средств комм... на орбите не найден. Мы брошены... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, смилост... Заберите... пока варпов... не добил!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Молитва по умирающим машинным духам вселяет в них решимость для одного последнего деяния, и голос становится четче.{/n} "Меровско.... штрафного легиона. Реквизировавший нас.... Себериан фон Валанциус погиб. У нас нет средств комм... на орбите не найден. Мы брошены... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, смилост... Заберите... пока варпов... не добил!"

languages.text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"
languages.original_text: {n}Молитва по умирающим машинным духам вселяет в них решимость для одного последнего деяния, и голос становится четче.{/n} "Меровско.... штрафного легиона. Заберите... пока варпов... не добил!"

languages.text: {n}死にかけている機械霊に捧げられた祈りは、彼らに最後の力を与え、声がより鮮明に響く。{/n}「メロー... 刑務所。我々を 徴用したのは... シベリアは死んだ。我々の通信手段は...軌道上にはない。我々は捨てられた... 天皇よ、慈悲を... 俺たちを... 歪みが... 終わらせる前に...」
languages.original_text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... Emperor, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"

languages.text: {n}Ölmekte olan makine ruhları için edilen dua, onlara son bir eylem için metanet bahşediyor ve ses netleşiyor.{/n} "Merov... Ceza İnfaz Lejyonu. Bizi talep eden... Seberian von Valancius öldü. İletişim aracımız yok... Yörüngede değil. Terk edildik... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, merhamet et... Öteboyut... İşimizi bitirmeden... Al canımızı!"
languages.original_text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ölmekte olan makine ruhları için edilen dua, onlara son bir eylem için metanet bahşediyor ve ses netleşiyor.{/n} "Merov... Ceza İnfaz Lejyonu. Bizi talep eden... Seberian von Valancius öldü. İletişim aracımız yok... Yörüngede değil. Terk edildik... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}, merhamet et... Öteboyut... İşimizi bitirmeden... Al canımızı!"

languages.text: {n}为垂死机魂献上的祷词赋予了它最后的气力，声音陡然清晰起来：{/n}“梅罗夫……判罪军团。征调我们的人……塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯已死。我们没有通讯手段……轨道上毫无痕迹。我们被抛弃了……{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，求您垂怜……在亚空间……将我们彻底吞噬之前……领回我们吧！”
languages.original_text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"

traits.locale_text: {n}为垂死机魂献上的祷词赋予了它最后的气力，声音陡然清晰起来：{/n}“梅罗夫……判罪军团。征调我们的人……塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯已死。我们没有通讯手段……轨道上毫无痕迹。我们被抛弃了……{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，求您垂怜……在亚空间……将我们彻底吞噬之前……领回我们吧！”

languages.text: {n}Ein Gebet für die sterbenden Maschinengeister gewährt ihnen den Mut für einen letzten Akt und die Stimme wird deutlicher:{/n} "Merov ... Straflegion. Der Mann, der uns requiriert hat ... Seberian von Valancius ist tot. Wir können nicht kommuni... im Orbit nicht gefunden. Wir wurden verlassen ... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} ... erbarme dich. Erhöre uns ... ehe der Warp ... uns verschlingt!"
languages.original_text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein Gebet für die sterbenden Maschinengeister gewährt ihnen den Mut für einen letzten Akt und die Stimme wird deutlicher:{/n} "Merov ... Straflegion. Der Mann, der uns requiriert hat ... Seberian von Valancius ist tot. Wir können nicht kommuni... im Orbit nicht gefunden. Wir wurden verlassen ... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} ... erbarme dich." Erhöre uns ... ehe der Warp ... uns verschlingt!"

languages.text: {n}Une prière adressée aux esprits mourants de la machine leur donne la force d'accomplir un dernier exploit, et la voix devient soudain plus claire :{/n} « Merov… Légion Pénale. Ceux qui nous ont réquisitionnés… Seberian von Valancius est mort. Nous n'avons aucun moyen de communication… n'est pas en orbite. Nous avons été abandonnés… Que l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} ait pitié de nous… Venez nous chercher… avant que le Warp… ne nous achève ! »
languages.original_text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Une prière adressée aux esprits mourants de la machine leur donne la force d'accomplir un dernier exploit, et la voix devient soudain plus claire :{/n} « Merov… Légion Pénale. Ceux qui nous ont réquisitionnés… Seberian von Valancius est mort. Nous n'avons aucun moyen de communication… n'est pas en orbite. Nous avons été abandonnés… Que l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} ait pitié de nous… Venez nous chercher… avant que le Warp… ne nous achève ! »

languages.text: {n}Una plegaria dirigida a los espíritus máquina moribundos les da fuerzas para un último acto, y la voz queda más clara:{/n} «Merov... Legión penal. El que nos requisó.. Seberian von Valancius ha muerto. No tenemos forma de comunicarnos... no está en órbita. Nos han abandonado... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, ten piedad... ¡Llévanos... antes de que la disformidad... nos remate!».
languages.original_text: {n}A prayer for the dying machine spirits grants them the fortitude for one final act, and the voice becomes clearer:{/n} "Merov... Penal Legion. The one who requisitioned us.. Seberian von Valancius is dead. We have no means of comm... not found in orbit. We have been abandoned... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, have mercy... Claim us... before the warp... finishes us off!"
